allow: Bash(PRISMA_MIGRATE_SKIP_GENERATE=false npx prisma migrate dev --name remove-email --accept-data-loss)

Bash(node -e "const {PrismaClient} = require\(''@prisma/client''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.$connect\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\(''Connected''\); return p.$disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")
